Summary: Senior backend engineer with 8 years of Python experience building FastAPI services, PostgreSQL-backed platforms, and async processing systems.

Experience:
Principal Backend Engineer, Acme SaaS, 2021-2026
- Built FastAPI microservices handling 20M API requests per month.
- Designed PostgreSQL schemas, indexes, and migration workflows for multi-tenant data.
- Improved p95 latency by 35% and added OpenTelemetry dashboards.
- Led Docker-based local development and CI deployment hardening.

Backend Engineer, DataWorks, 2018-2021
- Built async Python workers and REST APIs.
- Partnered with product and hiring managers to define reliable delivery milestones.

Skills: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, SQLAlchemy, Docker, async Python, observability, API security, technical communication.
